title: Workflow Email- More Recipient Options.
excerpt:
Request to enable workflows to send emails to email columns, people columns, people, teams, etc. Just like the automation/integrations allow. 


In Workflow you can only send emails to specific email addresses, typed out…

posts.author: Kasper (Jesse Churchill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request to enable workflows to send emails to email columns, people columns, people, teams, etc. Just like the automation/integrations allow.

  • In Workflow you can only send emails to specific email addresses, typed out.

  • In automation/integrations you can send it to email columns, people columns, people, or teams.

  • I think this needs an urgent fix since emailing is very common.
